title: GUI Fixer
description: Allows you to move slots in GUIs wherever you want
body:
# GUI Fixer
**GUI Fixer** is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.11 that lets you freely reposition inventory and interface slots in any GUI and save your custom layouts to a config file. _I will most likely not update that mod in the future but if you really need it then contact me on discord._

## Features
- Move any slot in any vanilla GUI (with either dragging the slot or by using arrow keys you can position them precisely)
- Custom layouts are saved automatically and persist between sessions
- Most modded GUIs are likely supported (compatibility may vary; testing recommended)
- Fully clientside, safe to use on multiplayer servers
- Customizable keybinds through Minecraft controls settings

## How to Use
1. Open the GUI you want to modify.
2. Press `Right Shift` to enter edit mode.
3. Slot outlines will appear, showing movable slots.
4. Drag slots wherever you want.
5. Press `Right Shift` again or exit the gui to save the layout.

### Reset Layouts
Press `R` to reset all GUI configurations back to default.

### Important Notes
This mod does not change GUI textures, only the slot positions are moved.
To visually move textures as well, you must create or use a custom resource pack.

### Compatibility
All vanilla GUIs are supported.
Modded GUIs are not guaranteed to work, but some might function correctly.

If you have any issues contact me on discord `xhvsh`
